description: Offline-only policy calibration scenarios for review. No production defaults are changed.

scenarios.name: Baseline Policy
scenarios.description: Current live-equivalent policy thresholds and risk gates.

scenarios.name: Moderate Threshold Softening
scenarios.description: Tests whether moderate threshold softening alone improves alert yield.

scenarios.name: Thresholds + Lighter Risk-Off Uplift
scenarios.description: Keeps conservative behavior but reduces risk-off BUY penalty while using moderate thresholds.

scenarios.name: Thresholds + Valuation Rebalance
scenarios.description: Tests if lowering valuation contribution with offsetting weight rebalance improves actionable alerts.

scenarios.name: Thresholds + Valuation Rebalance + Slightly Looser Buy Risk
scenarios.description: Sensitivity check for buy risk gate after threshold and valuation rebalance adjustments.
